arts.ttl: Storm Darragh deluge can't stop Man City vs Crystal Palace as three players send message
arts.sum: Manchester City began the defence of the FA Youth Cup with a third-round clash vs Crystal Palace at the Academy Stadium.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola challenges fan in the street: "Do you know what is lost?"
arts.sum: During the City's Champions League match against Feyenoord, Pep's team was leading by three goals, but they ultimately ended up tying the game 3-3. At the end of the match, the Spanish coach had scratches on his head and later declared that he harmed himself out of frustration.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City scouts identify €100M Rodri replacement
arts.sum: Manchester City scouts have pinpointed Valencia midfielder Pepelu as the ideal man to replace Rodri as the Spaniard recovers from his ACL injury, FootballTransfers has been told. The Denia-born player featured in almost every match of La Liga last season, playing 3,215 minutes across 36 of the 38 games.

arts.ttl: Laura Blindkilde Brown's Man City progress explained by Gareth Taylor after England debut
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Gareth Taylor reflects on Laura Blindkilde Brown's progress after she made her senior England debut this week.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola confronts fan in street as angry Man City manager has to be held back
arts.sum: Friday afternoon saw a video of Pep Guardiola angrily confronting a man filming him but the footage of the Manchester City boss appears to be historical rather than from recent weeks

arts.ttl: Man City's stance on European Super League 2.0 as new breakaway emerges
'There's been no contact': Agent says Man City are not in talks to sign wonderkid despite De Bruyne doubts
arts.sum: City may need to replace De Bruyne in 2025...

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs. Man City: Pep Guardiola's side at risk of equalling unwanted 55-year feat by top-flight champions
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City are at risk of equalling an unwanted 55-year feat when they take on Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Foden and Ake to miss Man City's game at Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Phil Foden and defender Nathan Ake have been ruled out of Manchester City’s game at Crystal Palace on Saturday. City manager Pep Guardiola provided injury updates on Friday and the list included defender Manuel Akanji, as well.

arts.ttl: BBC to show Man City v Salford & Arsenal v Man Utd in FA Cup
arts.sum: The BBC will show the FA Cup third-round games between Manchester City and Salford City and Arsenal and Manchester United.
